query: SELECT m.id, m.role, LEFT(m.content, 200) as content_preview, m.createdAt, cu.phone FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversationId = c.id JOIN customers cu ON c.customerId = cu.id ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 25;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2DPRZMbFg2pLCxP.d66dc093df58 --database hEsNGYEonud5ngJEe9CdHq --execute SELECT m.id, m.role, LEFT(m.content, 200) as content_preview, m.createdAt, cu.phone FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversationId = c.id JOIN customers cu ON c.customerId = cu.id ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 25;
